Read [AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md) first for project commands, architecture, styling, testing, deployment, and agent response conventions.

For the current 文字轉 Markdown/HTML 工具 feature context, use the existing Spec Kit artifacts under [`specs/002-text-markdown-html/`](../specs/002-text-markdown-html/): [`spec.md`](../specs/002-text-markdown-html/spec.md), [`plan.md`](../specs/002-text-markdown-html/plan.md), [`research.md`](../specs/002-text-markdown-html/research.md), [`data-model.md`](../specs/002-text-markdown-html/data-model.md), and [`contracts/text-markdown-html-converter.md`](../specs/002-text-markdown-html/contracts/text-markdown-html-converter.md).
